creator: lapo@lapo.it
text:
Just like ports/83360, the port security/botan is missing a digit in .so name and is thus not usable as a LIB_DEPENDS, which I would need to update devel/monotone port.
I'll try to post an upgrade patch here in the next days, but feel free to beat me to it. ;-)
(also, Botan is now at release 1.8.1)
